sentences.target: Im Gang liegt ein vergessener Regenschirm.

translations.de: Im Gang liegt ein vergessener Regenschirm.
translations.en: In the hallway lies a forgotten umbrella.
translations.es: En el pasillo hay un paraguas olvidado.
translations.fr: Il y a un parapluie oublié dans le couloir.
translations.it: Nel corridoio c’è un ombrello dimenticato.
translations.zh-Hans: 走廊里有一把被遗忘的雨伞。
translations.yue: 走廊度有把被遺忘嘅雨遮。
translations.pt: Há um guarda-chuva esquecido no corredor.
translations.vi: Trong hành lang có một chiếc ô bị bỏ quên.
translations.nl: In de gang ligt een vergeten paraplu.
translations.hu: A folyosón egy elfelejtett esernyő hever.
translations.hi: गलियारे में एक भूला हुआ छाता पड़ा है।
translations.el: Στον διάδρομο βρίσκεται μια ξεχασμένη ομπρέλα.
translations.nb: I gangen ligger en glemt paraply.
translations.id: Di lorong ada payung yang ketinggalan.
translations.sv: I hallen ligger ett bortglömt paraply.
translations.ro: În hol este o umbrelă uitată.
translations.da: I gangen ligger en glemt paraply.
translations.ja: 廊下に忘れられた傘がある。

tokens.explanation: Contraction of the preposition 'in' with the definite article 'dem' (dative). Introduces a locative prepositional phrase in the dative case.
Masculine noun; here means 'corridor'. Object of the preposition 'im', in dative singular.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular, present. Intransitive 'to lie/be located', predicating the location of the subject.
Indefinite article, masculine nominative singular; introduces the subject noun phrase.
Attributive adjective (participle used adjectivally), masculine nominative singular with mixed inflection after 'ein'; modifies 'Regenschirm'.
Masculine noun, nominative singular; head of the subject noun phrase.

sentences.target: Ich fahre im dritten Gang durch die Stadt.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈfaːʁə ɪm ˈdʁɪtən gaŋ dʊʁç diː ʃtat/

translations.de: Ich fahre im dritten Gang durch die Stadt.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈfaːʁə ɪm ˈdʁɪtən gaŋ dʊʁç diː ʃtat/
translations.en: I’m driving in third gear through the city.
translations.es: Conduzco por la ciudad en tercera.
translations.fr: Je roule en troisième en ville.
translations.it: Guido in terza per la città.
translations.ru: Я еду по городу на третьей передаче.
translations.pt: Estou dirigindo pela cidade em terceira marcha.
translations.vi: Tôi lái xe trong thành phố ở số ba.
translations.ar: أقود في المدينة على الغيار الثالث.
translations.nl: Ik rijd door de stad in de derde versnelling.
translations.uk: Я їду містом на третій передачі.
translations.hi: मैं शहर में तीसरे गियर में गाड़ी चला रहा हूँ।
translations.pl: Jadę przez miasto na trzecim biegu.
translations.el: Οδηγώ στην πόλη με τρίτη ταχύτητα.
translations.nb: Jeg kjører gjennom byen i tredje gir.
translations.id: Saya menyetir di kota dengan gigi tiga.
translations.sv: Jag kör genom stan på tredje växeln.
translations.ro: Conduc prin oraș în treapta a treia.
translations.da: Jeg kører gennem byen i tredje gear.
translations.ja: 街中を3速で走っている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, 1st person singular, present; denotes driving/traveling by vehicle.
Contraction of 'in dem' (dative). Introduces a dative prepositional phrase expressing manner (driving in a certain gear).
Ordinal adjective, masculine dative singular with weak/mixed inflection (ending -en after underlying 'dem'); modifies 'Gang'.
Masculine noun; here means 'gear' (of a vehicle). Object of 'im', in dative singular.
Preposition governing the accusative; indicates motion through an area.
Definite article, feminine accusative singular; determines 'Stadt' as object of 'durch'.
Feminine noun, accusative singular; object of the preposition 'durch'.

sentences.target: Ihr Gang wirkt heute etwas langsamer.

translations.de: Ihr Gang wirkt heute etwas langsamer.
translations.en: Her gait seems a bit slower today.
translations.es: Su paso hoy parece un poco más lento.
translations.fr: Sa démarche semble un peu plus lente aujourd’hui.
translations.it: Il suo passo oggi sembra un po’ più lento.
translations.ko: 오늘은 그녀의 걸음이 조금 느려 보여요.
translations.zh-Hans: 她今天走路看起来慢了一点。
translations.yue: 佢今日行路似乎慢咗啲。
translations.ru: Её походка сегодня кажется чуть медленнее.
translations.pt: O passo dela hoje parece um pouco mais lento.
translations.he: ההליכה שלה נראית היום קצת יותר איטית.
translations.tr: Bugün yürüyüşü biraz daha yavaş görünüyor.
translations.vi: Dáng đi của cô ấy hôm nay có vẻ chậm hơn một chút.
translations.nl: Ze loopt vandaag een beetje langzamer.
translations.uk: Її хода сьогодні здається трохи повільнішою.
translations.hu: A járása ma kicsit lassabbnak tűnik.
translations.hi: आज उसकी चाल थोड़ी धीमी लग रही है।
translations.pl: Jej chód wydaje się dziś trochę wolniejszy.
translations.el: Το βάδισμά της σήμερα φαίνεται λίγο πιο αργό.
translations.nb: Hun går litt saktere i dag.
translations.id: Langkahnya hari ini terlihat agak lebih lambat.
translations.sv: Hennes gång verkar lite långsammare i dag.
translations.ro: Mersul ei pare astăzi puțin mai încet.
translations.cs: Její chůze se dnes zdá o něco pomalejší.
translations.da: Hendes gang virker lidt langsommere i dag.
translations.fi: Hänen kävelynsä näyttää tänään hieman hitaammalta.
translations.ja: 彼女の歩き方は今日は少し遅く見える。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, nominative masculine singular; marks possession of 'Gang'. (Could mean 'her/their/your-formal' depending on context.)
Masculine noun; here means 'gait' or 'manner of walking'. Nominative singular subject of 'wirkt'.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular, present; 'to appear/seem'. Takes a predicative complement.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause; indicates the time ('today').
Degree adverb meaning 'somewhat/a bit'; modifies the comparative adjective 'langsamer'.
Comparative adjective used predicatively; complement of 'wirkt'.

sentences.target: Der zweite Gang ist die Suppe.

translations.de: Der zweite Gang ist die Suppe.
translations.en: The second course is the soup.
translations.es: El segundo plato es la sopa.
translations.fr: Le deuxième plat est la soupe.
translations.it: Il secondo piatto è la zuppa.
translations.pt: O segundo prato é a sopa.
translations.nl: Het tweede gerecht is de soep.
translations.el: Το δεύτερο πιάτο είναι η σούπα.

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine nominative singular; determines the subject noun phrase.
Ordinal adjective, masculine nominative singular with weak inflection (-e) after definite article; modifies 'Gang'.
Masculine noun; here means a 'course' of a meal. Nominative singular subject.
Copular auxiliary, 3rd person singular, present; links subject to predicate nominal.
Definite article, feminine nominative singular; determines the predicate nominal 'Suppe'.
Feminine noun, nominative singular; predicate nominal identifying what the second course is.

Der zweite Gang ist die Suppe.
